# VaultLister — llms.txt
# https://vaultlister.com/llms.txt

## Product

VaultLister is a multi-channel reselling platform for online sellers who list and sell second-hand goods across multiple marketplaces simultaneously. It is designed for independent resellers, vintage sellers, and small reselling businesses who need to manage inventory, cross-list items, and automate repetitive marketplace tasks without paying per-listing fees.

## Who It's For

VaultLister is built for:
- Resellers who sell on 2 or more marketplaces at the same time
- Canadian sellers who need CAD pricing and Canada Post shipping label integration
- Sellers on Poshmark, eBay, Mercari, Depop, Grailed, Etsy, Shopify, Facebook Marketplace, and Whatnot
- Power sellers managing 50–5,000+ active listings across platforms

## Key Capabilities

- Cross-list a single inventory item to up to 7 live marketplaces in one action (4 more coming soon)
- Real-time inventory sync: when an item sells on one platform, it is automatically marked sold and delisted everywhere else
- AI-powered listing generation: describe an item and Claude AI writes the title, description, and tags optimized for each platform
- Playwright-based automation bots for Poshmark closet sharing, follow-back, and offer rules — runs on a schedule without manual input
- Offer management: accept, counter, or decline offers across all platforms from one dashboard
- Sales analytics: revenue, sell-through rate, average sale price, and platform performance by date range
- Image Vault with AI tagging: upload photos once, reuse across all listings, auto-tag with item attributes
- Shipping label generation via EasyPost (Canada Post, FedEx, UPS, USPS, DHL)
- Stripe-powered subscription billing: Starter (C$9/mo), Pro (C$19/mo), Business (C$49/mo)

## Differentiation

- Canadian-first: CAD pricing, Canada Post integration, Canadian seller community focus
- Zero per-listing fees: flat monthly subscription, unlimited listings
- Offline-capable: progressive web app works without internet for inventory browsing
- AI listing generation included in all plans — not a paid add-on
- Open API for developers: full REST API with Swagger documentation

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage: https://vaultlister.com/
- Pricing: https://vaultlister.com/pricing.html
- API documentation: https://vaultlister.com/api-docs.html

- Help center: https://vaultlister.com/help.html
- Platform integrations: https://vaultlister.com/platforms.html
- Sitemap: https://vaultlister.com/sitemap.xml

## Comparisons

VaultLister positions against: Crosslist, Vendoo, List Perfectly, PrimeLister, Flyp, SellerAider, OneShop, Nifty, Closo, and Crosslist Magic. See https://vaultlister.com/compare/ for full feature comparisons.

## Contact

- Support: https://vaultlister.com/contact.html
- Feature requests: https://vaultlister.com/request-feature.html
- Affiliate program: https://vaultlister.com/affiliate.html
